description: Exact tolerances for PRSG-010 mirrored backstop, O5, routing, and exception education guidance.

final_backstop.stop_boundary.rationale: Stop-before-PR boundaries are operator-facing safety contracts.

exception_education.rejected.rationale: Generated/template provenance must be rejected consistently.

o5_contract.shape.rationale: O5 must remain flat and topology-first across surfaces.

routing_contract.signal_or_hint.rationale: Router JSON vocabulary is a closed contract.
